secondary_goals: IITP 과제 수주 준비 (과제3 코드생성 + 과제6 운용개선)
constraints: 인력 충원 전까지 AI 자동화로 버티기

learned_patterns.pattern: aiedu launch-blockers form dependency chains
learned_patterns.detail: #58 must land before #59; #53 (data) before #54 (UX). ALL RESOLVED 2026-04-01.

learned_patterns.pattern: naia-os P0 inflation from epics
learned_patterns.detail: Epic #182 + 2 children (#183, #184) all P0 = 3 P0s from one initiative. Epic itself could be P1 tracking issue.

learned_patterns.pattern: all issues pre-labeled by maintainer
learned_patterns.detail: Only exception found: #189 (new issue, no labels at creation). Agent added P2-medium.

learned_patterns.pattern: dual priority labels exist on some issues
learned_patterns.detail: #159 (P1+P2), #4 (P1+P3), #6 (P2+P3). Maintainer-set, not agent-modified. Flagged for cleanup.

learned_patterns.pattern: aiedu burst closures indicate focused sprint
learned_patterns.detail: 6 issues closed in ~10 min window (01:35-01:44 UTC) suggests concentrated work session. Launch-blockers cleared in single push.

learned_patterns.pattern: memory v2 research active with detailed benchmarks
learned_patterns.detail: #145 epic has 7 comments with quantitative benchmark data (47%→66% progression). Active research, not stale.

learned_patterns.pattern: Chrome embedding subsystem has bug cluster
learned_patterns.detail: #162 (X11 overlay, P1) and #197 (broken in dev, unlabeled) both in Chrome embedding. Likely share root cause. Recommend investigating together.

learned_patterns.pattern: any-llm repo redirects from nextain/nextiani-any-llm
learned_patterns.detail: API calls to nextain/any-llm get redirected. Old issues still reference old repo name.

learned_patterns.pattern: new issues created without labels
learned_patterns.detail: #203, #202, #197, #193, #192, #11, #15, #14 all created without priority labels. Pattern: maintainer creates issues quickly, triage catches up.

learned_patterns.pattern: zero close velocity in reporting periods
learned_patterns.detail: Scorecard shows 0 closed issues in 7-day window. New issue creation (8) outpaces closure. Research/benchmark phase may explain.

learned_patterns.pattern: progress file phase=close doesn't mean GitHub issue is closed
learned_patterns.detail: #184 progress file has closed=true and phase=close but GitHub issue still open. Session interruption can prevent the final GitHub close step. Check for divergence.

learned_patterns.pattern: prod accident creates immediate safety tooling sprint
learned_patterns.detail: 2026-04-03 prod accident (any-llm deployed without user approval) → deploy-guard built same day with 2-consecutive-clean review. Reaction time: <8h.

learned_patterns.pattern: any-llm open issues can drop sharply in single session
learned_patterns.detail: any-llm went 10→4 open issues between 2026-04-03 and 2026-04-04. Indicates focused cleanup sessions happen periodically.

learned_patterns.pattern: OpenClaw removal epic spans multiple child issues
learned_patterns.detail: #186 epic → #201 (Phase 4 complete), #208 (skill bundle), #209 (dist cleanup). After all children done, epic itself may be closeable.

learned_patterns.pattern: voice stop token bug surfaces from benchmark research
learned_patterns.detail: #181 benchmark work revealed #207 (Talker stop token 6561 not generated → 20s fixed audio). Research issues generate bug discoveries as side effects.

learned_patterns.pattern: alpha-memory sprint creates burst of dependent issues
learned_patterns.detail: #210-#214 all created 2026-04-04 in chain: export→backup API→backup UI→npm publish→docs. Memory v2 sprint pattern: plan all children at once.

learned_patterns.pattern: aiedu B2C sprint creates purchase flow bug cluster
learned_patterns.detail: 2026-04-06: #68 (purchase page login), #71 (purchase flow), #70 (landing layout) all created same day. B2C prep sessions create grouped bug discovery.

learned_patterns.pattern: admin B2C pipeline issues created in burst before aiedu launch
learned_patterns.detail: 2026-04-06: admin #14-#17 all created same day. Pattern: admin B2C readiness sprint precedes aiedu launch.

learned_patterns.pattern: zero close velocity during active sprint is normal
learned_patterns.detail: Scorecard shows 0 closes/7d but active hotfix commits (4 files, 3+edits/24h). Work happening but issue closure lagging. Not a blocker signal.

learned_patterns.pattern: voice sprint issues created in pairs targeting same file
learned_patterns.detail: #219 (migrate /v1/omni → /v1/realtime) and #220 (Silero ONNX VAD) both target minicpm-o.ts. Created same day, tightly coupled. Should be worked in single session.

learned_patterns.pattern: stale P0s flagged 3 consecutive triages without action
learned_patterns.detail: #187, #182, #175 flagged as stale on 2026-04-06, 04-07, 04-08. 8-9 days inactive. Pattern: P0 inflation without deprioritization when focus shifts to B2C sprint.

learned_patterns.pattern: temporal memory benchmark gap drives new issue creation
learned_patterns.detail: naia-os 221 created directly from benchmark finding (temporal 0/25 = 0 percent). Benchmark research directly generates actionable issues with quantitative acceptance criteria.

learned_patterns.pattern: harness maturity analysis creates strategic meta-issues
learned_patterns.detail: member-luke 19/20 are meta-level analysis issues (not feature work). Gap analysis from external training material. Pattern: periodic self-assessment creates meta-issues that spawn child implementation issues.
